# Blog Edit

Read the paper in `<paper.pdf>` or `<paper.txt>`, the official repository
snapshot in `<repository>/`, and these two existing article files:

- `<article.md>`
- `<article.zh.md>`

The target reader is a technically qualified engineer who may not know the project; the finished prose should be clear, natural, technically serious, and restrained.

Improve both articles using your own judgment.

The only operational constraint is that you must edit the existing files from
top to bottom, one paragraph at a time. Use one Edit operation for one paragraph,
then continue to the next paragraph. Do not replace either complete file in one
operation.

When finished, report the two paths.
